branches.label: feature
branches.description: Yeni geliştirmeler. Sıfırdan bir iş birimi eklemek için kullanılır.

branches.label: bugfix
branches.description: Test/staging ortamında tespit edilen hatalar. develop üzerinden açılır.

branches.label: hotfix
branches.description: Production'da kritik hata. master'dan açılır, iki yere birden merge edilir.

checklist: master hedefli MR aç & merge et
Conflict varsa hemen çöz & merge et
tr.tip: Branch prefixine göre pipeline davranışını ayarlamak, yanlış deploy riskini sıfıra indirir. Aşağıdaki örnekler .gitlab-ci.yml içine doğrudan eklenebilir.

ciCards.title: Feature & Bugfix Pipeline
ciCards.description: Sadece build + test çalıştırır. Deploy tetiklenmez; yalnızca develop merge'ünde çalışır.
ciCards.code:
build:feature:
  stage: build
  only:
    - /^feature\/.*/
    - /^bugfix\/.*/
  script:
    - ./gradlew build test

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - develop
  environment: staging
  script:
    - ./deploy.sh staging

ciCards.title: Hotfix Pipeline
ciCards.description: Hotfix branch'inde prod deploy tetiklenmez; yalnızca master merge'ünde manuel onay ile çalışır.
ciCards.code:
build:hotfix:
  stage: build
  only:
    - /^hotfix\/.*/
  script:
    - ./gradlew build test

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - master
  when: manual
  environment: production
  script:
    - ./deploy.sh production

ciCards.title: Otomatik Back-Merge Job
ciCards.description: Hotfix master'a merge olduktan sonra develop'a otomatik MR açar.
ciCards.code:
back-merge:to-develop:
  stage: .post
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - |
      curl --request POST \
        --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GL_TOKEN" \
        --data "source_branch=master&
                target_branch=develop&
                title=back-merge" \
        "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/\
         $CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests"

ciCards.title: Staging Auto-Deploy
ciCards.description: develop'a her merge'de staging otomatik güncellenir.
ciCards.code:
deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - develop
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - docker build -t app:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .
    - docker push registry/app:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
    - kubectl set image \
        deploy/app app=registry/app:\
        $CI_COMMIT_SHA

conflictSteps.title: Hotfix branch'ini lokalde güncel hale getir
conflictSteps.code:
git checkout hotfix/issue-15610
git pull origin hotfix/issue-15610

conflictSteps.title: develop'ı hotfix üzerine merge et (conflict'leri görmek için)
conflictSteps.code:
git fetch origin develop
git merge origin/develop

conflictSteps.title: Conflict işaretlerini bul ve çöz
conflictSteps.code:
# Conflict olan dosyaları listele
git status

# Editörde aç, <<<<<<< / ======= / >>>>>>> bloklarını çöz
git add src/payment/PaymentService.java

conflictSteps.title: Merge commit oluştur ve push'la
conflictSteps.code:
git commit -m "back-merge: master hotfix → develop (conflict resolved)"
git push origin hotfix/issue-15610

conflictSteps.title: GitLab'da develop hedefli MR aç ve merge et
conflictSteps.code:
# GitLab UI → Merge Requests → New Merge Request
# Source: hotfix/issue-15610
# Target: develop
# Title:  [HOTFIX back-merge] Ödeme hatası → develop

tr.warning: Dikkat: Back-merge conflict'i erteleme. develop'ta bozuk kalırsa sonraki feature ve bugfix branch'leri aynı conflict'i miras alır. Hotfix master'a merge olduktan hemen sonra back-merge yapılmalı.

branches.label: feature
branches.description: New developments. Used to add a brand new unit of work from scratch.

branches.label: bugfix
branches.description: Bugs found in test/staging environment. Branched off from develop.

branches.label: hotfix
branches.description: Critical production bug. Branched off master, merged into two places.

en.tip: Adjusting pipeline behavior by branch prefix reduces the risk of wrong deployments to zero. The examples below can be added directly to .gitlab-ci.yml.

ciCards.title: Feature & Bugfix Pipeline
ciCards.description: Runs build + test only. Deploy is not triggered; only runs on develop merge.
ciCards.code:
build:feature:
  stage: build
  only:
    - /^feature\/.*/
    - /^bugfix\/.*/
  script:
    - ./gradlew build test

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - develop
  environment: staging
  script:
    - ./deploy.sh staging

ciCards.title: Hotfix Pipeline
ciCards.description: Prod deploy is not triggered on hotfix branch; only runs on master merge with manual approval.
ciCards.code:
build:hotfix:
  stage: build
  only:
    - /^hotfix\/.*/
  script:
    - ./gradlew build test

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - master
  when: manual
  environment: production
  script:
    - ./deploy.sh production

ciCards.title: Automatic Back-Merge Job
ciCards.description: After hotfix is merged to master, automatically opens an MR to develop.
ciCards.code:
back-merge:to-develop:
  stage: .post
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - |
      curl --request POST \
        --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $GL_TOKEN" \
        --data "source_branch=master&
                target_branch=develop&
                title=back-merge" \
        "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/\
         $CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests"

ciCards.title: Staging Auto-Deploy
ciCards.description: Staging is automatically updated on every merge to develop.
ciCards.code:
deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  only:
    - develop
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - docker build -t app:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .
    - docker push registry/app:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
    - kubectl set image \
        deploy/app app=registry/app:\
        $CI_COMMIT_SHA

conflictSteps.title: Update hotfix branch locally
conflictSteps.code:
git checkout hotfix/issue-15610
git pull origin hotfix/issue-15610

conflictSteps.title: Merge develop into hotfix (to see conflicts)
conflictSteps.code:
git fetch origin develop
git merge origin/develop

conflictSteps.title: Find and resolve conflict markers
conflictSteps.code:
# List files with conflicts
git status

# Open in editor, resolve <<<<<<< / ======= / >>>>>>> blocks
git add src/payment/PaymentService.java

conflictSteps.title: Create merge commit and push
conflictSteps.code:
git commit -m "back-merge: master hotfix → develop (conflict resolved)"
git push origin hotfix/issue-15610

conflictSteps.title: Open develop-targeted MR on GitLab and merge
conflictSteps.code:
# GitLab UI → Merge Requests → New Merge Request
# Source: hotfix/issue-15610
# Target: develop
# Title:  [HOTFIX back-merge] Payment bug → develop

en.warning: Warning: Do not postpone back-merge conflicts. If develop stays broken, subsequent feature and bugfix branches inherit the same conflict. Back-merge must be done immediately after hotfix is merged to master.
